catalog_content:
Item Name: Pride Of India - Himalayan Black Salt - Coarse Grind, 1 Pound (16oz) Jar - Kala Namak - Contains 84+ Minerals - Use in grinders, restaurants & cooking - Perfect for Faux Egg Recipes & Vegan Scramble
Bullet Point 1: HIMALAYAN BLACK SALT: Black Himalayan salt is one of the cleanest and most beneficial salts in the world. It has nutritional and therapeutic properties. You may recognize black Himalayan salt from its egg white taste in tofu scrambles. It can be used in cooking and to create relaxing bath bombs and salts for kids and adults. The salt in this pack is coarse grind, and is extremely rare.
Bullet Point 2: USE BLACK SALT IN COOKING: BLACK salt can be used in cooking. Add about a quarter teaspoon or a pinch of salt per serving size portion of food. The minerals in the salt help hydrate the body due to presence of rich electrolytes. It also helps with better metabolism and overall body Ph levels. Put black salt blocks in a salt shaker or pink salt grinder.
Bullet Point 3: NATURAL VEGAN SALT: Pride of India Himalayan black salt is enriched with up to 84 minerals. Additionally, it is gluten-free, GMO-free, non-irradiated, vegan, cholesterol-free. The blackish appearance of our black salt proves its purity. Once you try this salt, you will never want to use table salt again!
Bullet Point 4: HEALTH BENEFITS: Black Salt (Kala Namak) is a easing salt - often used to help with digestion and ease constipation.May be good to regulate blood pressure as it contains lower sodium content than regular salts.
Bullet Point 5: EASY SALT BATH: To make the perfect Himalayan salt bath, mix between 2 to 3 cups of salt (120 to 150 gm) in a tub full of hot water. Gently swirl the salts in water 1quntil they dissolve. Soak for 10 to 40 minutes for a therapeutic spa treatment. Breathe in the steam to invigorate your senses and for nasal passage relief. Let the salt minerals relax stiff muscles and heal skin naturally.
Product Description: Pride of India incorporates organically-grown food and herbal products from India into our daily life. These all-natural ingredients help enhance the overall health of the human body. Pride of India is family owned and operated, and we manufacture our products in the USA. Our Himalayan Black Rock Salt is the purest form of salt available on planet Earth because it does not undergo any artificial treatment or refining processes. It is carved out from decades-old, naturally occurring salt reserves at the bed of the giant Himalayan mountains in the Indian subcontinent. The blackish appearance of our salt proves its purity. This coarse salt contains up to 84 essential minerals that are quintessential for the human body in daily nutrition. The grainy texture, distinct flavor, and easy solubility of our black salt make it great for kitchen use as well as in the bath. Black Himalayan salt contains sodium and other electrolytes that can help balance electrolytes, regulate hydration, balance PH levels, . Commercial table salt contains between 97.5% and 99.9% sodium chloride, while Himalayan salt only contains about 87%. Additionally, many table salts go through a bleaching process and may even contain harmful ingredients. Our Himalayan salt, however, is natural and doesn’t go through a refining process. Black salt can be used in salt lamps, as a salt substitute, in bath scrubs, or as a bath salt. It’s also a superior substitute for table salt. Use a pinch in your favorite recipe!
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium positioning with strong health and natural branding, emphasizing purity and mineral content. Coarse grind and 16oz jar size suggest niche appeal for specialty cooking and wellness uses, justifying a higher price point than standard table salt. Family-owned brand with US manufacturing adds perceived quality, while certifications like gluten-free, GMO-free, and vegan broaden market reach beyond standard salt consumers.

Item Name: Organic Red Wheat Bran, 4 Ounces – Non-GMO, Milled Outer Layer of Hard Red Wheat Berries, Unprocessed, Vegan, Kosher, Bulk. High in Dietary Fiber. Perfect for Hot Cereals, Muffins, and Baked Goods
Bullet Point 1: ✔️ ORGANIC, NON-GMO, KOSHER, VEGAN: Red Wheat Bran by Food to Live is USDA Organic, Kosher, Non-GMO, 100% Raw, and Unprocessed. Besides, it is suitable for Vegan and Keto diets.
Bullet Point 2: ✔️ HIGHLY NUTRITIOUS, GREAT SOURCE OF FIBER: Wheat Bran is one of the best sources of dietary fiber which is essential for a balanced diet. Moreover, it is rich in protein, Riboflavin, Thiamine, Potassium, Niacin, Iron, Magnesium, and Phosphorus.
Bullet Point 3: ✔️ THICKENER & VERSATILE INGREDIENT: Organic Red Wheat Bran can be used as a thickener in soups, stews, and sauces. It can also be added to smoothies, yogurt, and protein shakes. Sprinkle it over oatmeal, granola, casseroles, and salads.
Bullet Point 4: ✔️ GREAT FOR BAKING, FLOUR SUBSTITUTE: Wheat Bran works amazing in baked goodies like pizza crusts, muffins, cakes, tarts, cookies, and biscuits. In most recipes you can substitute up to 1/3 of flour with Red Wheat Bran.
Bullet Point 5: ✔️ CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Organic Red Wheat Bran by Food to Live is packaged in resealable bags that are convenient to store and use.
Value: 4.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Affordably priced organic bulk ingredient targeting health-conscious consumers, positioned as a versatile, nutrient-dense alternative to refined flour. Standard resealable packaging and lack of premium branding suggest mid-tier value, while USDA Organic, Non-GMO, and Kosher certifications justify a premium over conventional wheat bran. Targets keto, vegan, and fiber-focused diets with functional benefits like thickening and flour substitution, appealing to home bakers and health-oriented shoppers.
